UserState.title: UserState
UserState.description: User consolidated financial state including accounts, credit cards, categories, transactions, savings, and settings.

data.description: Full FlucState object containing all accounts, transactions, and preferences.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp (milliseconds) of the latest change to the state data.

lastSyncedAt.description: Timestamp (milliseconds) of the last successful synchronization.

clientLastChangedAt.description: Timestamp (milliseconds) of the client's last local change.

/users/{userId}.description: User-specific document storing consolidated financial state to prevent sync delays and inconsistencies.
